extraction.one_line_summary: MAJKA Rafal soloed from breakaway 10km out on Sierra de la Pandera, holding off GC favorites' late attacks by 27 seconds
tactical_patterns: Near-vertical Val de Penas climb at 30km broke the breakaway before final climb, exposing weak collaborators early.
NIBALIi earned 4-second sprint bonus despite arriving with Froome group, actively gaming time bonuses despite apparent strength parity.
CONTADOR's attack at 3.5km failed to distance Froome, suggesting GC stalemate requires earlier or steeper terrain moves.

rider_signals.MAJKA Rafal: positive: Committed solo attack 10km from summit on category HC climb after already surviving 25% gradient selection
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: Finished 27s behind winner but distanced all other GC contenders on final climb, gaining 31s on Froome
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: Alert enough to contest sprint bonuses within favorites group, hunting marginal gains despite not attacking
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: neutral: Attacked 3.5km out but couldn't drop Froome, suggesting insufficient differential power on moderate gradients
rider_signals.CHAVEZ Johan: negative: Lost time on Pantera climb, falling back in GC rankings on this HC finish
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: negative: Suffered same fate as Chavez on final climb, indicating GC pretensions fading
